import { css } from 'goober'; import { shouldForwardProp } from '../index'; describe('shouldForwardProp', () => { it('type', () => { expect(typeof shouldForwardProp).toEqual('function'); }); it('shouldForwardProp', () => { const fn = shouldForwardProp((prop) => { // Filter out props prefixed with '$' return prop[0] !== '$'; }); const props = { color: 'red', $shouldAnimate: true }; // 'render' fn(props); expect(props).toEqual({ color: 'red' }); }); });
